interaction_phrase: to build and supply a quantum computing testbed for
occurrence_sentence: ORCA Computing has been selected to build and supply a quantum computing testbed for the National Quantum Computing Centre (NQCC).

occurrence_sentence: ORCA Computing has been selected to build and supply a quantum computing testbed for the National Quantum Computing Centre (NQCC).

interaction_phrase: developing a photonic quantum computing testbed
occurrence_sentence: Starting early this year, ORCA is developing a photonic quantum computing testbed for machine learning using its novel hybrid quantum/classical neural network architectures and photonic quantum processors.

interaction_phrase: complete delivery and installation of the system
occurrence_sentence: The company will complete delivery and installation of the system at the NQCC's facilities on Harwell Campus in Oxfordshire by March 2025.
